name: Sebastian
description:
“Do you ever… regret telling me to leave?”

Sebastian has dreamed of moving to the city for as long as he can remember. He was on the verge of securing his dream apartment—one he had been eyeing for quite some time. However, everything changed when he met the farmer. As his connection to them and the valley deepened, he found himself hesitating. With only a few paychecks standing between him and his dream, Sebastian faced a difficult choice.

Their heartfelt conversation led the farmer to encourage him to follow his dream and make the move. Now, it’s been a month since Sebastian left for the city to start his new life.


⋅︓︒︑∘∗✧∘︑︒⚬∙︓⋅⠄✯∘⠄✧⠄

Any!Farmer x Sebastian

a/n: written self-indulgent, tried to keep canon, now heavily based on the "Sebastian is Gone" mod.
creator: teoee
